title: Can't run kind command in cmd or git bash but kind is install via podman desktop
body:
### Issue Description

I can t run kind command in cmd or git bash but kind is install via podman desktop
i tells me that kind is not found

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. kind 

### Describe the results you received

bash: kind: command not found

### Describe the results you expected

kind command working
